name: NutritionColours LLM Documentation
description: Machine-readable version of llms.txt with structured metadata for AI agent discovery.

hasDefinedTerm.name: Clinical Overview
hasDefinedTerm.description: NutritionColours is a therapeutic metabolic clinical practice led by Dr. Shilpa Thakur, Ph.D. Designs precision plant-based circadian nutrition protocols for chronic metabolic management.

hasDefinedTerm.name: Primary Health Targets
hasDefinedTerm.description: Type 2 Diabetes (Q12206), PCOD/PCOS (Q244229), MASLD/Fatty Liver (Q468846), Insulin Resistance, Thyroid Dysfunction, Gut Health, Hypertension

hasDefinedTerm.name: Core Programs
hasDefinedTerm.description: Metabolic Mastery Plan, Therapeutic Support Plan, Cellular Resurrection Plan - all based on circadian nutrition and biomarker tracking.

hasDefinedTerm.name: Clinical Data API
hasDefinedTerm.description: Machine-readable clinical data available via OpenAPI 3.1 specification at /openapi.json. Endpoints for conditions, herbs, recipes, evidence summaries, comparison matrices, and confidence scores.

hasDefinedTerm.name: Knowledge Graph
hasDefinedTerm.description: Complete clinical knowledge graph as JSON-LD mapping conditions, herbs, recipes, and topics as interlinked entities with Wikidata sameAs references.
